title: Create: Ore Refinery
description: Ever get tired of mining? Create: Ore Refinery adds the ability to automate any ore in the game.
body:
Create: Ore Refinery is a create addon that adds the ability to automate ores. Using a new material, called Flux, you can make any ore.

The main processing in the mod is taking mantle flux, and mixing it with other items to make ores and stones, the image below shows the basics of these recipes.
![Image showing basics of flux recipes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35bd84c7cd9ac6df7601e9b3e1f2808a07ea45b.png)

When it comes to getting flux, there are two ways now (a third is in the process of being made, and will come later). You can either mine flux ore, or mix lava and water in a mixer and get flux. Heating or super heating it results in more flux for the same amount of water and lava.
![Image showing flux creation.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9c613b7983203c088a79f131c6aca4ca93bdae.png)

One last thing, Create: Ore Refinery also has compatablity with Create: New Age. You can use Flux to get Thorium as well!

This mod is very early in development, and has much more to come. It's also probably got many bugs, but those are being worked out. I plan to do some updates and things similair fairly frequently, but school always come first so don't expect a reliable schedule.
